requested_items.objective: Measure corrected nm2/nm4 NPU compute blocks in a compressed floorplan targeting nm64-like utilization.

expected_result.reason: If nm2/nm4 delay worsens substantially at about 46% utilization, PnR flexibility is a dominant contributor to the nm64 delay penalty.

requested_items.objective: Measure corrected nm32/nm64 NPU compute blocks in an expanded floorplan targeting nm2-like utilization for nm64.

expected_result.reason: If nm64 delay improves near low-nm timing at about 29% utilization, PnR flexibility is a dominant contributor; otherwise centralized logic scaling remains significant.
